summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of modal z-index bug fix. All 10 test scenarios passed successfully. The primary bug (modal being covered by sidebar) is fully resolved.
passed_tests: Modal z-index hierarchy verified (overlay: 9999, modal: 10000, close button: 10001, all above sidebar z-index 40)
Overlay covers full viewport including sidebar area (fixed position, inset 0, 1920x1080)
Modal centered in full viewport (680px width, perfectly centered at viewport center, not offset by sidebar)
Sidebar blur effect applied when modal open (body.modal-open class adds filter: blur(4px) to sidebar)
Body scroll locked when modal open (overflow: hidden)
Modal internal scroll working (overflow-y: auto, max-height: 85vh)
Live Demo and Go to Website buttons present in modal
Modal closes with X button click (modal unmounts, sidebar blur removed)
Modal closes with Escape key press
Modal closes when clicking overlay (outside modal content)
Regression test: Modal opened and closed 3 times successfully
